name: extract-video-info
description: Prepare evidence and extract visible text, captions, and structured facts from social videos.

interface.shortDescription: Extract text and facts from social videos
interface.longDescription: Prepare frame sheets, OCR hints, metadata, and review artifacts so agents can extract evidence-backed facts from Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, or local videos.
defaultPrompt: Use Extract Video Info to list the books mentioned in this video URL.
Use Extract Video Info to extract all visible product names and ratings from this reel.
